calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Feb-07-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Vivian Lerche, Attorney at Law, Tel. 415.680.5731, specially appearing for Kelstin Group on behalf of plaintiffs Kelkris;
Sara Franco, pro per, Tel. 415.209.3309, for defendants.

Ruling: A R G U E D. ASSIGNEE, KELSTIN GROUP INC. HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION, as to Sara E. Franco, is partially granted and partially denied. The levying officer is directed to release 50% of the held funds to the judgment creditor, and 50% of the held funds to the judgment debtor. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.
